de.uka.ilkd.key.util.pp

Class WriterBackend

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.pp.WriterBackend
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Backend
    Deprecated.

    @Deprecated
public class WriterBackend
extends Object
implements Backend
    A Backend which writes all output to a java.io.Writer. The mark(Object o) method does nothing in this implementation. There is a method count() which returns the number of characters written by this so far. This class is the cause for numerous unnecessary "throws IOException" clauses throughout the entire project. It should be removed and replaced by StringBackend. (Kai Wallisch 09/2014)
